name: com.mamsaa.www
title: Mamsa
description: Search and inspect Mamsa vacation-rental listings across Saudi Arabia. Read-only access to the public catalogue: search by city, unit type, capacity, nightly price and rating; fetch full listing details and guest reviews.

tools.name: search_units
tools.title: Search units
tools.description: Search Mamsa vacation-rental listings in Saudi Arabia by city, unit type, guest capacity, nightly price range and rating. Returns matching units with pricing and a link to each listing.

tools.name: get_unit
tools.title: Get unit
tools.description: Fetch the full details of one Mamsa listing by id: description, amenities, check-in/out times, cancellation policy, coordinates and images.

tools.name: list_featured_units
tools.title: List featured units
tools.description: List the currently popular/featured Mamsa listings.

tools.name: get_unit_reviews
tools.title: Get unit reviews
tools.description: Fetch guest reviews for one Mamsa listing by id.
